expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the verdict and the “Case Focus Coverage” section explicitly enumerate: “OK confirmation behavior”, “Cancel / dismissal outcomes”, and “Pending selection / loading state”, plus detailed bullets for “Confirm selection with OK”, “Cancel confirmation path”, “Dismissal outcomes”, and “Pending selection / loading behavior”. This directly matches the expectation.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md has a dedicated “Phase Alignment (Phase 4a)” section stating Phase 4a requires a “subcategory-only QA draft with scenarios and atomic steps (no top-layer grouping)”, and execution_notes.md says “Kept assessment aligned to Phase 4a… Did not introduce Phase 4b-style canonical top-layer grouping.” The content remains at Phase 4a scenario-planning granularity.
